summary: Implemented ADR 0273 from an isolated latest-origin/main worktree by enforcing public hostname and certificate concordance in repo validation, replaying the governed route-ledger and shared-edge automation, and verifying live HTTPS plus SAN coverage end to end.

verification.check: Focused ADR 0273 regression and make-target coverage
verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest tests/test_subdomain_exposure_audit.py tests/test_edge_publication_makefile.py tests/test_validate_repo_cache.py -q` returned `35 passed in 0.37s`.

`uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/subdomain_exposure_audit.py --validate` completed successfully, and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh data-models agent-standards` passed after the certificate catalog and validator updates.

verification.check: Governed route-ledger replay with public-endpoint admission control
verification.observed: `make route-dns-assertion-ledger env=production` completed successfully with final recap `localhost ok=56 changed=0 failed=0 skipped=24`, proving the new admission gate does not block the already-aligned public DNS state.

verification.check: Shared-edge publication replay with certificate concordance
verification.observed: `make configure-edge-publication env=production` completed successfully with final recap `nginx-lv3 ok=61 changed=4 failed=0 skipped=14`; the play revalidated the inputs, rendered the final NGINX configuration, and verified the HTTP and HTTPS probe hostnames before completing.

`curl -I https://lv3.org` returned `HTTP/2 308` redirecting to `https://nginx.lv3.org/`; `curl -I https://docs.lv3.org` and `curl -I https://ops.lv3.org` both returned `HTTP/2 302` to their `oauth2/sign_in` paths with `x-robots-tag: noindex, nofollow`; `echo | openssl s_client -servername docs.lv3.org -connect docs.lv3.org:443 2>/dev/null | openssl x509 -noout -issuer -subject -ext subjectAltName` showed a Let's Encrypt issuer (`CN=E7`) and SAN coverage for `docs.lv3.org`, `ops.lv3.org`, `agents.lv3.org`, `api.lv3.org`, `apps.lv3.org`, `changelog.lv3.org`, `coolify.lv3.org`, `draw.lv3.org`, `headscale.lv3.org`, `home.lv3.org`, `langfuse.lv3.org`, `logs.lv3.org`, `lv3.org`, `n8n.lv3.org`, `nginx.lv3.org`, `realtime.lv3.org`, `registry.lv3.org`, `status.lv3.org`, `tasks.lv3.org`, and `wiki.lv3.org`.

`make subdomain-exposure-audit` wrote audit run `2f66b12b-e342-464e-a6a4-c69516bc92f9` at `2026-03-29T11:15:55.744650Z`; the ADR 0273 concordance checks passed, while the audit still reported the pre-existing `git.lv3.org` warnings `active_subdomain_missing_expected_public_resolution` and `active_catalog_subdomain_missing_from_zone`.

notes: The live apply started from the isolated worktree `/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.worktrees/ws-0273-public-endpoint-admission-control` on branch `codex/ws-0273-public-endpoint-admission-control`, created from the latest fetched `origin/main`.
The route-ledger replay remained fully idempotent, while the shared-edge replay performed four safe changes on `nginx-lv3` during its validation and reload path.

The docs build performed by `make configure-edge-publication` regenerated `docs/site-generated/architecture/dependency-graph.md` with Pagefind front matter, so this branch records that generated-docs update alongside the ADR 0273 receipt.
Protected integration files (`VERSION`, `changelog.md`, `versions/stack.yaml`, and any generated release surfaces) intentionally remained pending until the final mainline integration step.
